---
title: "random_flip"
generated: true
description: "Independently reflect along each eligible axis with probability `p`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.augment.geometric`](../nitrix-augment-geometric.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:random_flip -->
```python
random_flip(x: Float[Array, '...'], key: Array, *, axes: Optional[Sequence[int]] = None, p: float = 0.5) -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:random_flip -->
Independently reflect along each eligible axis with probability `p`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:random_flip -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `...` | — | Input tensor. |
| `key` | `Array` | — | — | PRNG key. |
| `axes` | `Optional[Sequence[int]]` | — | `None` | Axes eligible for flipping. `None` (default) makes every axis eligible; for a channels-last volume pass the spatial axes so the channel axis is never reflected. |
| `p` | `float` | — | `0.5` | Per-axis reflection probability. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. A tensor with the same shape and dtype as `x`, reflected along each eligible axis for which the per-axis coin came up heads.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:random_flip -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
